sections.title: 01. USAGE RIGHTS
sections.content: You are free to use the generated SVG text effects for both personal and commercial Canva projects. No attribution required, but we love it if you do!

sections.title: 02. DATA & PRIVACY
sections.content: We don't store your text or designs. Everything happens in your browser (Client-side). Your creativity stays yours.

sections.title: 03. NO BUGS? NO PROMISES
sections.content: While we strive for perfection in every SVG path, the app is provided 'as-is'. We aren't responsible for any design mishaps.
